logs.heading: A0: Checking Jira script progress via debug log

thoughts: The script is running in the background (timeout after 300s). I need to start monitoring it.
First check if the jira-debug.log exists and its current state.
Then set up a monitoring loop that checks every 30 seconds up to 10 times.
I'll read the debug log now to see initial status.
